feat.name: Feral Lunge
feat.prerequisite: *Werecreature Dedication*; your animal shape grants a fangs or jaws unarmed attack
feat.requirement: You’re in hybrid or animal shape.
feat.text: You spring on an unsuspecting opponent, tearing at them with your teeth. You Stride up to 10 feet and make a jaws Strike at the end of that movement. If you began this action hidden, you remain hidden until after this Strike. If you have a fly or swim Speed, you can Fly or Swim up to 10 feet instead of Stride.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.
